title: Women's League action
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Pacaltsdorp United (249/7) maintain their unbeaten record in the SWD Women’s Division 1 competition with an impressive 159 runs victory against Union Stars (90 all out).","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Pacaltsdorp United (249/7) maintain their unbeaten record in the SWD Women’s Division 1 competition with an impressive 159 runs victory against Union Stars (90 all out)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For Pacaltsdorp United Julia Hoal made an unbeaten 100."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In other matches the past weekend Union Stars beat George
